Choosing the most appropriate time to im.I08_excerpt: One thing that counts is the moment you choose to do the refactoring. Choosing the most appropriate time to im.I09_excerpt: If you want to refactor and you can refactor, do it on the most stable version. Choosing the most appropriate time to im.I24_excerpt: I don't do refactoring during sprints; I do it afterwards precisely so as not to impact the work people are doing during that sprint.
